title: pavonia grandiflora
intro: Pavonia grandiflora, also known as the Rocky Mountain Rose Mallow or Large-flowered Pavonia, is a perennial flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant is used in traditional herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pavonia grandiflora include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and relieving menstrual cramps, making it a popular natural remedy. Herbal preparations of Pavonia grandiflora include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, making it a valuable addition to any natural medicine cabinet.
